title: chrysanthemum alpinum subsp. tomentosum
intro: Chrysanthemum alpinum subsp. tomentosum, also known as the woolly alpine chrysanthemum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum alpinum subsp. tomentosum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support immune function.
